title: clematis orientalis subsp. oweniae
intro: Clematis orientalis subsp. oweniae, also known as the Oriental clematis or Manchu clematis, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of clematis orientalis subsp. oweniae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat conditions such as arthritis and respiratory infections. The plant's roots and leaves are used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
